violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

The door to the outside, located in the (back kitchen), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

The (ceilings ) in the (kitchen) area is in poor repair. Observed water stains and missing tile exposing insulation and electrical wires. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026
Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs and raw sausage) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (produce) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer and knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Establishment to use 3 bay sink for sanitizing until repaired and/or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

(Various food product) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

The door to the outside, located in the (back kitchen ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the (food and equipment shelves throughout establishment ) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

The (ceilings ) in the (kitchen ) area is in poor repair.Observed water stains and missing tiles exposing insulation and electrical wires. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026

Various food product was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024
Several refrigeration units located in the kitchen area was not in good repair (observed tapes wrapped around handles and tape covering gaskets). New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the slicer have an accumulation of food residue. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024
The ceilings the back kitchen area is in poor repair(observed water stains). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2024
